title: Join the VALORA Team
subtitle: Explore exciting career opportunities and become part of our growing team. We are looking for talented individuals to help shape the future of real estate.
noPositionsDesc: There are no open positions at the moment. Please check back later for new opportunities.
applicationSubmittedDesc: Thank you for applying. We will review your application and contact you soon.
tagsHint: Press Enter or click Add button to add tags
emailMissingLocalPart: Email must have a name before @
emailMissingDomain: Email must have a domain after @
emailMissingDot: Email domain must contain a dot (e.g., gmail.com)
emailArabicPunctuation: Email contains Arabic punctuation (٫) instead of dot (.)
acceptTerms: You must accept the terms and conditions
submissionError: Failed to submit application. Please try again.
fixErrors: Please fix the errors in the form
invalidSalary: Please enter a valid salary (numbers only)
inactiveJob: This position is no longer active
jobNotFoundDesc: The job position you are looking for does not exist
iAgree: I agree to the terms and conditions

terms.instructions: Please review and accept each term individually to proceed.

checkStatusSubtitle: See whether you already submitted an application using your email and phone number.
checkStatusHint: Enter the same email and phone number you used in your previous application.
emailPhoneRequired: Please enter both email and phone number.
companyUnavailable: Company data is not available right now. Please try again shortly.
notAppliedYet: No previous application was found with this information.
statusCheckFailed: Unable to check application status right now.
